titleStmt.title: SII 11.163: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 163. (B.K. No. 219 of 1926-27.) ABBIGĒRI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE LEANING AGAINST THE LEFT WALL OF THE VILLAGE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Phālguṇa, amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding probably to A.D. 1113, March 19, Wednesday, when there was a solar eclipse; the week-day seems to be an error. The record revives a lapsed grant of land made by Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Ācharasa at the request of Āycharāja, the pergaḍe of Abheyageṟe, the Eight Gāvuṇḍas, the Sixty Families and others to the tank (called) Dēviṁgeṟe. Abheyageṟe is stated to have been situated in Nareyaṁgal Twelve, which was a sub-division of Beḷvaḷa Three-Hundred. The chief Ācharasa seems to have belonged to the Sinda family as in line 35, the rule of a chief over Kisukāḍu is mentioned. At the end of the inscription is recorded a gift of flower-garden and oil-mill for worship, etc., to god Chennakēśava by Dēvaladēvi, the wife of Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Chandarasa, on Friday, the 14th tithi in the month of Māgha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha .
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka śrīmatribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kuḷakamaḷi nīdivākaraṁ satyaratnākaraṁ
maṇḍaḷika kāṟana
damaged
kaḷakaḷita
ṭānīkamaṁ kōpa bāppamama
maleva pogaḷalke
verppeḍe ḷantāga
vṛkṣapātadinēṁ
nāridirāntu roḷu
śaraṇa vastuvāha
na vṛttiyaṁ
manamosadeyde koṭṭa gambhīranē vārddhigaṁ piri
yaṁ śauciga
rācanṛpanoḷ harāṭṭa hā
tkutkīḷakuḷiśa vanitāmārana ntāca
viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷ
hōmaṁ nimirccu nindhanava tannitta
vi vennade pūrvvāvanīśvara tene nṛpanoḷ . vacana .
Antu tannāḷkeya kisukāḍunāḍoḷage munnaṁ nirmmisida basadi brahmapuri dēvāyata
naṁgaḷu modalāgi naḍeva sama[stadharmmaṁgaḷa ] svadharmmasthitiyiṁ pratipāḷisuttamirddu
ttaṁ tanna prabhutvadū rbbeḷvala mūnūṟaṟoḷagaṇa narayaṁgalu panneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ Abbeya
geṟeya dēviṁgeṟege munnaṁ pūrvvadiṁ naḍeva taḷavṛtti paraṁparavṛtti palavu kālaṁ māṇḍirala
lliya perggaḍe samastaguṇagaṇa mananisida manupamāna puṇyabhājana
nenisirddāycarājanuṁ budhahṛdayakumudānandacandranō mattamalliye(ṁ)ṇba rggāvu
ṇḍugaḷuṁ hannasu kiṟuviṭṭu Aṟuvattokkalu vintivarellaruṁ naredu bandī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmasthi
tiyiṁ punarbhbharaṇaṁ māḍi (pratipāḷisi) pratipāḷisi nīvuṁ naḍeyisalke vēḷkumendu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
Ācarasargge binnapaṁ geyyalavara binnapamaṁ savistaradivyacittadoḷavadhārisi kēḷdu cāḷukya
vikramavarṣada 37 neya nandana saṁvatsarada phālguṇadamavāśye Ādityavāra sū
ryyagrahaṇaṁ vyatīpātavintinituṁ kūḍida puṇyatithiyoḷ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ācarasa
r . Ā keṟege karavageyindaṁ baḍagalu . Ummacigeya baṭṭeyindaṁ mūḍalu . paḷḷa dindaṁ teṁ
kalu . nāgēśvaradēvara ciṇnagāvuṇḍaṁ naḍuvaṇa keyyindaṁ paḍuvalirppattanālku gēṇuṁ ḷcaviḍiya
gaḍiṁbada gaḷeyalirppattanālku mattarkkariyakeyyaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi sarvva
namaśyammāḍi dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ biṭṭar . mattamavara binnapadiṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasampannarappa śrīma
dagrahāraṁ rōṇada mahāviṣṇu bhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge jakkiliya sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa kari
yanala mmatta rppanneraḍu mattamalliṁ paḍuva lagrahāraṁ Eleyapurvvaravaḷḷiya narasiṅgha
bhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge biṭṭa kariya nela mattarppanneraḍu . matta malliṁ baḍaga nareyaṁgalla candaya
ṣaṁangiyargge biṭṭa kariya nala mattarāṟu . Antu mūvattaṁ brahmapurige sarvva bādhāparihā
ramāgi sarvvanamasyadiṁ biṭṭa mattar Intīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidargge gaṁgāsāgara prayā
ge vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrtthaṁ kurukṣētrameṁbī tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileya kōḍumaṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁca
ratṁangaḷoḷ kaṭṭasi caturvvēdapāragarappa mahābrāhmaṇargge dakṣiṇegoṭṭa phaḷamu mubhayamukhi
goṭṭa phaḷamu makku . midanaḷida pāpātuma nā puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvva
rbāhmaṇaruma nēḷkōṭi tapōdhanaruma naḷida pātaka paṁcamahāpātakanu māgi narakakke gaḷagaḷeniḷiguṁ . ka .
Idanācaṁdrārkkaṁbara muditōditamigi naḍasede pāpa dinaḷida durātmaṁ narakaṁgaḷoḷe gaḷagaḷa
niḷiguṁ . Ārasergge sēseye ndarasara kāṇike gāya dharmma muṇbaṁ deṟeyeṁ daruvaṇa mēgaḷvaṇa mendaregāṇiya nakke
koṇḍava rccāṇḍāḷar . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētundripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī]yō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāgina ®prārtthi
vēndrān . bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundarāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasa
hasrāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . jinapati deyva nṛpāḷaṁ tande barmmadēvaṁ bhāvaṁ tana gāycarāja nene ne
gaḷda naycarājaṁ samudramudritadhareyoḷ . v® . binnaṇa moppuva binnaṇaṁ samudbhavisidu
vaṇna nīnaṁdene yoppuva binnaṇa minneṇe peṟaṁgivu neṟe vibudhāvaḷi paṁpuvetta narnna vapari
vēṣṭitāvaniyo ḷaycaparāja nadēṁ kritārtthanō . sāsana mācandrārkkaṁ sāsanamena lācanṛpana viśadayataśaśśrīsāsanama
nartthiyiṁdī sāsanamaṁ bareda naycarājaṁ mudadiṁ . maṟevesanenagāytīgaḷ keṟevesanēnūsedu nāgimayya
dēvaṁ keṟe dharmmēta vaṟanaṁ mēlnōḍi naḍeyipaṁ dharmmadanō . svasti śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
caṁdarasadēvara paṭcamahādēvi (dēvuladēviyarappa) śrīmatu dēvuladēviyaru māgha māsada caturdasi sukravāra
vyatīpāta saṁkramaṇadaṁdu śrīcenna kēśavadēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi naṁdādīvige geṁdu dēvarim mūḍalu
biṭṭa gāṇa maneyoṁdu sarvvanamaśya dēvara trikālada pūjegendu biṭṭa hūdōṭa mātaṁgēśvaradēvara toṭa
diṁ mūḍalu śrīmadarasara kammattadiṁ paḍuvalu sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa mattaroṁdu .
Digital edition of SII 11.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
